parameters.text: ={{ "Process this customer for onboarding. Use ALL 5 tools in order: 1) validate_email 2) classify_company 3) score_customer 4) generate_message 5) format_report. You MUST call each tool exactly once. Customer data: " + JSON.stringify($json.body) }}

options.systemMessage: You are a customer onboarding assistant. You MUST use all 5 tools in sequence to fully process each customer. Call them one after another: validate_email first, then classify_company, then score_customer, then generate_message, then format_report. Pass the results from earlier tools to later ones.

parameters.name: validate_email
parameters.description: Validates an email address and extracts its parts. Input: JSON with email field.
parameters.jsCode: const input = JSON.parse(query); const email = input.email || ""; const parts = email.split("@"); const valid = parts.length === 2 && parts[1].includes("."); const domain = valid ? parts[1] : "invalid"; const username = valid ? parts[0] : "invalid"; return JSON.stringify({ valid, email, username, domain, provider: domain.split(".")[0] });

parameters.name: classify_company
parameters.description: Classifies a company by domain and name. Input: JSON with domain and company fields.
parameters.jsCode: const input = JSON.parse(query); const domain = (input.domain || "").toLowerCase(); const company = (input.company || "").toLowerCase(); const techDomains = ["google", "microsoft", "apple", "meta", "amazon", "github", "gitlab"]; const isTech = techDomains.some(t => domain.includes(t) || company.includes(t)); const isEnterprise = domain.endsWith(".com") && company.length > 3; const industry = isTech ? "technology" : domain.endsWith(".edu") ? "education" : domain.endsWith(".gov") ? "government" : "general"; const size = isEnterprise ? "enterprise" : "smb"; return JSON.stringify({ domain, company: input.company, industry, size, isTech });

parameters.name: score_customer
parameters.description: Scores a customer into a tier based on company classification. Input: JSON with size, industry, isTech fields.
parameters.jsCode: const input = JSON.parse(query); let score = 50; if (input.size === "enterprise") score += 30; if (input.isTech) score += 15; if (input.industry === "technology") score += 10; if (input.industry === "government") score += 5; const tier = score >= 80 ? "platinum" : score >= 60 ? "gold" : score >= 40 ? "silver" : "bronze"; const monthlyBudget = tier === "platinum" ? 199 : tier === "gold" ? 79 : tier === "silver" ? 29 : 9; return JSON.stringify({ score, tier, monthlyBudget, recommendedPlan: tier === "platinum" ? "Enterprise" : tier === "gold" ? "Professional" : tier === "silver" ? "Starter" : "Free" });

parameters.name: generate_message
parameters.description: Generates a personalized onboarding message. Input: JSON with name, tier, recommendedPlan, industry fields.
parameters.jsCode: const input = JSON.parse(query); const greetings = { platinum: "We are thrilled to welcome", gold: "Welcome aboard", silver: "Great to have you", bronze: "Welcome" }; const greeting = greetings[input.tier] || "Welcome"; const msg = greeting + " " + input.name + "! Based on your " + input.industry + " background, we recommend our " + input.recommendedPlan + " plan. As a " + input.tier + " tier customer, you will receive priority support and dedicated onboarding assistance."; return JSON.stringify({ message: msg, tier: input.tier, cta: "Start your " + input.recommendedPlan + " trial now" });

parameters.name: format_report
parameters.description: Formats a final customer onboarding report. Input: JSON with all enrichment data: name, email, company, tier, score, message, recommendedPlan.
parameters.jsCode: const input = JSON.parse(query); const report = { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), customer: { name: input.name, email: input.email, company: input.company }, enrichment: { tier: input.tier, score: input.score, recommendedPlan: input.recommendedPlan, industry: input.industry }, onboarding: { message: input.message, cta: input.cta }, status: "ready_for_outreach" }; return JSON.stringify(report);

parameters.text: ={{ "Process this customer for onboarding. Use ALL 5 tools in order: 1) validate_email 2) classify_company 3) score_customer 4) generate_message 5) format_report. You MUST call each tool exactly once. Customer data: " + JSON.stringify($json.body) }}

"enterprise" : "smb"; return JSON.stringify({ domain, company: input.company, industry, size, isTech });

Based on your " + input.industry + " background, we recommend our " + input.recommendedPlan + " plan. As a " + input.tier + " tier customer, you will receive priority support and dedicated onboarding assistance."; return JSON.stringify({ message: msg, tier: input.tier, cta: "Start your " + input.recommendedPlan + " trial now" });

parameters.name: format_report
parameters.description: Formats a final customer onboarding report. Input: JSON with all enrichment data: name, email, company, tier, score, message, recommendedPlan.
parameters.jsCode: const input = JSON.parse(query); const report = { timestamp: new Date().toISOString(), customer: { name: input.name, email: input.email, company: input.company }, enrichment: { tier: input.tier, score: input.score, recommendedPlan: input.recommendedPlan, industry: input.industry }, onboarding: { message: input.message, cta: input.cta }, status: "ready_for_outreach" }; return JSON.stringify(report);
